UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User profile information for both patients and pharmacists.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

pharmacyName.description: The name of the pharmacy (only for pharmacists).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

MedicationRequest.title: Medication Request
MedicationRequest.description: A request for a missing medication created by a patient.

id.description: The unique ID of the request.

patientUid.description: The UID of the patient who created the request.

patientName.description: The name of the patient who created the request.

medicationName.description: The name of the medication requested.

medicalInfo.description: Medical information and notes from the patient.

location.description: The location where the medication is needed.

prescriptionUrl.description: URL of the uploaded prescription image.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the request was created.

PharmacyOffer.title: Pharmacy Offer
PharmacyOffer.description: An offer from a pharmacist to provide a requested medication.

id.description: The unique ID of the offer.

requestId.description: The ID of the medication request.

pharmacistUid.description: The UID of the pharmacist who made the offer.

pharmacyName.description: The name of the pharmacy making the offer.

phone.description: The phone number of the pharmacy.

message.description: A message from the pharmacist to the patient.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the offer was created.

MedicationDonation.title: Medication Donation
MedicationDonation.description: A donation of medication by an individual or charity.

id.description: The unique ID of the donation.

medicationName.description: The name of the donated medication.

expiryDate.description: The expiry date of the medication.

contactPhone.description: The contact phone number of the donor.

imageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded medication image.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the donation was created.

/medication_requests/{requestId}.description: Medication requests stored by request ID.

/medication_requests/{requestId}/offers/.description: Offers for a specific medication request.

/medication_donations/{donationId}.description: Medication donations stored by donation ID.
